name: Pure Camp
overview: Hiiieeee!!  America's favorite drag-couple, Sharon Needles and Alaska are taking their relationship to the next level, the Great Outdoors! Watch as the queens fiddle with their equipment to try and pitch a tent, rubbing sticks to build a fire, and beating a bushy thicket to clear a trail.  All puns aside, these two vampy camp tramps butch-it-up in the wilderness, with cat walks and impromptu dance parties to boot! Can these two gay city-boys survive the forest? Will hungry bears (animal or man) attack and pillage base-camp?

trailers.title: Sharon Needles and Alaska: Pure Camp - Trailer
